skill.name: omanut-ai
skill.description: Autonomous Company-in-a-Box — manage conversations, customers, tickets, media, analytics, AI training, content scheduling, image/video generation, brand alignment, BMS operations (sales, invoices, stock, payments), Meta platform publishing (Facebook, Instagram), and safety guardrails (budget ceilings, HITL approval, P&L checks).

conversations.list_conversations: List recent customer conversations with filters
conversations.get_conversation: Get full conversation with all messages for analysis
conversations.send_message: Send WhatsApp message to a customer

analytics.list_customers: Customer segments with engagement and conversion scores
analytics.list_payment_transactions: Payment history and status for revenue tracking

ai_quality.get_ai_config: Current AI model, temperature, prompt, and tool settings
ai_quality.list_ai_errors: AI error logs — hallucinations, misroutes, quality issues
ai_quality.update_ai_config: Self-tune: change model, temperature, system prompt, enabled tools
ai_quality.get_agent_strategy: Read agent routing, strategy, and content scheduling preferences

knowledge.update_knowledge_base: Add or update knowledge base documents

content_scheduling.list_scheduled_posts: List posts by status: pending_approval, approved, published, failed
content_scheduling.review_scheduled_post: Approve, reject, or edit a scheduled post — content approval agent
content_scheduling.create_scheduled_post: Create a new post with caption, image, platform, and timing

image_generation.list_generated_images: Audit AI-generated images: prompts, approval status, brand assets used
image_generation.get_image_generation_settings: Read style, tone, brand colors, visual guidelines
image_generation.update_image_generation_settings: Tune style/tone/colors to fix brand drift

brand_identity.list_product_identity_profiles: Audit product fingerprints: hex colors, labels, exclusion keywords
brand_identity.update_product_identity_profile: Fix brand alignment: edit exclusions, colors, labels

video_generation.list_video_jobs: Monitor video jobs: status, provider, aspect ratio, failures

bms_operations.bms_check_stock: Check product stock levels in the business management system
bms_operations.bms_create_invoice: Generate an invoice for a customer
bms_operations.bms_generate_payment_link: Create a Lenco payment link for checkout
bms_operations.bms_list_products: List all products from the BMS catalog

meta_platform.send_facebook_message: Send a Facebook Messenger DM to a customer
meta_platform.send_instagram_message: Send an Instagram DM to a customer
meta_platform.reply_facebook_comment: Reply to a Facebook or Instagram comment
meta_platform.publish_facebook_post: Publish immediately to the company's Facebook Page
meta_platform.publish_instagram_post: Publish immediately to the company's Instagram account

safety_guardrails.get_spending_guard: Check daily budget ceiling — MUST call before any spend action
safety_guardrails.request_approval: Human-in-the-Loop: send WhatsApp approval request to owner before high-risk actions
safety_guardrails.get_financial_health: P&L sanity check — returns 'expansion' or 'cost_cutting' mode

autonomous_loop.description: The agent can run a recursive Analyze → Research → Create → Promote → Sell → Audit loop autonomously.

setup_instructions: 1. Generate an API key in the Omanut dashboard (Settings → API Keys)
4. Restart OpenClaw to load the skill
5. Configure agent_spending_limits in the database for budget guardrails
6. Set the company boss_phone for HITL approval notifications
